title: OASISﾂｮ NAYLORBASEﾂｮ Master Board 60 x 19cm (23.5" x 7.5")
features: Super strong plastic base, anti-slip feet
5cm depth of OASIS Ideal Floral Foam
description: OASIS NAYLORBASE Master Boards for funeral, casket and coffin sprays , double ended sprays, table decorations, church and festival decorations. The contoured shape gives more room to manoeuvre and requires less flowers, foliage and time to flower up than similar products. Super strong plastic base, 5cm thick wetable foam. Applied anti-slip feet prevent movement and damage. Available in two sizes.
